programmes.show_description: Documentary-style drama with Danny Dyer. Hard-drinking Tommy Johnson uses his love of football as an excuse for indulging in violence, but conflicts quickly spiral out of control. (2004)
Classic horror starring Christopher Lee and Peter Cushing. When a mysterious frozen creature awakens on the Trans-Siberian Express, two men must fight to contain its awful power. (1972)
Legend returns soon.
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. A paroled safe-cracker is approached to join a new gang, but tells Walker and hatches a plan... S5, Ep23
The outbreak of a revolution interferes with the gang's plans to rescue three American agents from a Third World country. S5, Ep5
The Invaders implement a plot to raise the radiation on Earth to dangerous levels and then claim to be mankind's saviours by offering an antidote to the effects.
Action adventure starring Dina Meyer (Starship Troopers). An astronomer and a cryptographer unwittingly unearth a murderous Sphinx and must solve deadly puzzles to trap it back in its tomb. (2008)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Western with Howard Keel. A Confederate prisoner-of-war is offered his freedom in return for becoming the sheriff of a lawless Union town, and ends up defending it from a corrupt saloon owner. (1968)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
Western with Dale Robertson. Mismatched travellers, including a bank robber, a politician and a dancing girl, fend off Cheyenne warriors after their stagecoach is ambushed in the desert. (1956)
Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month!
The Klingons and the Enterprise crew answer the same distress signal, and a malevolent being stirs up a distrust between them that leads to a violent battle. S3, Ep7/24
As the summit of world leaders begins, Vincent races to the scene hoping to reveal the truth about the Invaders' nefarious plan.
General Stockwell orders the team to steal a Soviet stealth fighter-jet, but is then is kidnapped by a spy who plans to torture him for information. S5, Ep6
Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. Drug gangs recruit middle-schoolers, resulting in a turf war that puts students in danger. S5, Ep24
Action thriller sequel with Jason Statham. Hitman Arthur Bishop is blackmailed into committing three assassinations when his arch-enemy Crain kidnaps his girlfriend. (2016)
Thriller with Michael Douglas. While trying to expose a neo-Nazi who infiltrated the White House, a Secret Service agent is framed for murder and his protege is told to bring him to justice. (2006)
Action with Jean-Claude Van Damme. An ex-soldier supports the family of his murdered brother by participating in underground street fights - but one fight proves tougher than the rest. (1990)
Thriller inspired by true events with Arnold Schwarzenegger. The lives of two strangers become inextricably bound together after a devastating plane crash. (2017)

Sci-fi with Jack Coleman. A scientist scrambles to save his family - and the world - when a comet passes Earth and shifts the planet's magnetic field, leading to a deadly storm. (2009)

Spine-chilling horror anthology with Peter Cushing. A sideshow specialising in torture reveals the hidden greed and violence of its sceptical customers, warning them of evil in their futures. (1967)
Sci-fi thriller. A dying scientist tries to tap the geothermal energy of the Earth's interior by detonating an underground thermonuclear device - which threatens to split the earth in two. (1965)

Kirk and Spock search for a way to avert tragedy on two fronts when McCoy discovers he has only a year to live and an asteroid jeopardises a Federation planet. S3, Ep8/24
Vincent investigates a supposed prophet who glows red in a similar fashion to that of dying aliens while evangelising to his flock.
Face plans to leave the A-Team, but agrees to help a beautiful reporter save the life of a future president of the National Brotherhood of Labour Unions. S5, Ep7
Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Walker investigates a mystery illness sweeping across the children on a Cherokee reservation from polluted water. S5, Ep25
Fact-based gangster drama with Al Pacino. An FBI undercover agent infiltrates the mob and finds himself identifying more with the mafia life - at the expense of his regular one. (1997)
Action thriller with Wesley Snipes. A federal marshal hellbent on justice and revenge teams up with a skydiver to capture a convict who escaped from custody after killing his brother. (1994)
